title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Momonosuke, Luffy, Nami, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what if you're a warrior? I'm gonna be King of the Pirates one day, so there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day I will be Anointed Shogun of Wano, so take that!! You half-wit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You are nothing but an ignorant ape!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: What are you, momo, just some figurehead?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you just gonna stand there and cry?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright! Then let's team up!! It's an alliance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the spirit, momo!! You may be a cowardly, jumped-up,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Top- Knotted Brat, But You're Right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Find a way to survive!! We'll have your back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'LL ASK YOU ONE MORE TIME, BOY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may not have always gotten along, but we still came a long way together....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was wrong about you Luffy! You fiend!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is mistaking "being free" for "free to be rude!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not at all! By the way, momonsuke- Sama...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is there a reason we aren't flying?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Momo- Suke-sama, you are the undisputed Shogun of Wano now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Depending on Luffy-Dono's words, I may have no choice but cleave him apart for this slight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Exactly! That is the way of the Samural! I thought we were pals, Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think you're blowing this out of proportion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He humiliated us! overlooking this without giving him a few blows and bites is out of the question!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, you guys the next time we meet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be as enemies! Don't whine to me if we're shooting to kill.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
